normalChats.title: First Impression by the Fire Pit

turns.celebrityLine: You are new here. Are you here for love, clout, or chaos?

options.label: Keep it romantic
options.playerLine: Love first, drama second, and clout never.
options.celebrityReply: Bold answer. I respect someone who commits to a story.

options.label: Play it cool
options.playerLine: I am just feeling the vibes and seeing what happens.
options.celebrityReply: Safe answer, but safe is not always memorable.

options.label: Lean into chaos
options.playerLine: I am here to flip this villa upside down.
options.celebrityReply: If you bring chaos to me, I will end it quickly.

turns.celebrityLine: People think I am hard to impress. What makes you different?

options.label: Confident charm
options.playerLine: I am consistent. I do not switch up when things get messy.
options.celebrityReply: Consistency is rare in here. That gets points from me.

options.label: Tease lightly
options.playerLine: I am not trying to impress you. I am letting you discover me.
options.celebrityReply: Interesting. You are either confident or reckless.

options.label: Neg her
options.playerLine: I do not think you are that hard to impress.
options.celebrityReply: Try disrespect again and we are done talking.

turns.celebrityLine: Last question. Are you loyal, or do your eyes wander?

options.label: Promise loyalty
options.playerLine: If I choose you, I stand on it.
options.celebrityReply: Good. I like a person who can back their words.

options.label: Be honest
options.playerLine: I stay open until someone gives me a real reason not to.
options.celebrityReply: At least you are honest. I can work with honest.

options.label: Stay noncommittal
options.playerLine: I go wherever the best energy is that day.
options.celebrityReply: Then do not expect me to wait around.

turns.celebrityLine: Tonight feels tense. Are you going to calm things down or stir the pot?

options.label: Protect her peace
options.playerLine: I would rather protect your peace than chase cheap drama.
options.celebrityReply: That is a grown answer. I like grown energy.

options.label: Neutral stance
options.playerLine: Depends who starts it. I can do both.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Adaptability matters in this villa.

options.label: Start trouble
options.playerLine: I stir the pot first and ask questions later.
options.celebrityReply: Then keep my name out of your mess.

turns.celebrityLine: If someone tried to pull me from you, what would you do?

options.label: Fight for it
options.playerLine: I would pull you for a private chat and remind you why I am your best option.
options.celebrityReply: Strategic and confident. You are learning quickly.

options.label: Let it play out
options.playerLine: I would trust you to decide and then move based on your choice.
options.celebrityReply: Independent. Not my favorite, but not weak either.

options.label: Act jealous
options.playerLine: I would crash out and call them out in front of everyone.
options.celebrityReply: Public meltdowns are not attractive on you.

turns.celebrityLine: Give me one reason to keep choosing you in this villa.

options.label: Future-focused
options.playerLine: Because with me, you get chemistry and stability.
options.celebrityReply: Chemistry and stability? That is a dangerous combo.

options.label: Funny answer
options.playerLine: Because I am hot, helpful, and emotionally available enough.
options.celebrityReply: You are funny. I will give you that.

options.label: Cocky answer
options.playerLine: Because everyone else here is a downgrade.
options.celebrityReply: Arrogance is not confidence. Know the difference.

postTwoChats.successLine: Kim pulls you close and kisses you hard. "Do not make me regret this," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Kim steps back and folds her arms. "I said enough. Leave me alone for now."

turns.celebrityLine: I fall hard, fast, and sometimes messy. Can you handle that?

options.label: Reassure her
options.playerLine: I can handle real feelings, not just pretty moments.
options.celebrityReply: That is the first answer tonight that felt honest.

options.label: Stay cautious
options.playerLine: Maybe, but I move slower than that.
options.celebrityReply: Slow can be safe. It can also be boring.

options.label: Judge her
options.playerLine: That sounds like chaos with a glitter filter.
options.celebrityReply: Then do not stand close if you cannot take the heat.

turns.celebrityLine: Some days I reinvent myself before lunch. Is that a red flag to you?

options.label: Support her growth
options.playerLine: No, it means you are still discovering yourself out loud.
options.celebrityReply: You get me more than most people do.

options.label: Neutral take
options.playerLine: Depends if it is growth or just mood swings.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. I can admit it is both sometimes.

options.label: Call her fake
options.playerLine: It means nobody knows who you really are.
options.celebrityReply: Cruel is not the same as clever.

turns.celebrityLine: Are you picking me because I am sparkly, or because you can hold me when things crash?

options.label: Choose depth
options.playerLine: I want the real version, even the messy one.
options.celebrityReply: Okay. That answer felt like a hug.

options.label: Keep it light
options.playerLine: Both. Sparkle first, depth later.
options.celebrityReply: At least you are honest about your priorities.

options.label: Deflect
options.playerLine: I just like winning hard rounds.
options.celebrityReply: I am not a trophy for your scoreboard.

turns.celebrityLine: If your head turns tomorrow, do you tell me first or ghost me in public?

options.label: Promise clarity
options.playerLine: You hear it from me first. Always.
options.celebrityReply: Good. I can survive pain, not disrespect.

options.label: Half-commit
options.playerLine: I would tell you if I was sure.
options.celebrityReply: Noted. You hedge when it gets hard.

options.label: Keep options open
options.playerLine: I move with the villa energy, not promises.
options.celebrityReply: Then move away from me with that.

turns.celebrityLine: People think I am all glitter and romance. What do you see?

options.label: See her complexity
options.playerLine: I see someone soft, strategic, and stronger than she looks.
options.celebrityReply: Okay... that one hit me in the chest.

options.label: Playful answer
options.playerLine: I see trouble in expensive boots.
options.celebrityReply: Trouble can be fun when it is aimed correctly.

options.label: Dismissive answer
options.playerLine: I see another person addicted to attention.
options.celebrityReply: Projection is loud on you right now.

turns.celebrityLine: Final check. Are you someone I can trust when the villa starts screaming?

options.label: Anchor her
options.playerLine: Yes. I hold steady when everyone else spirals.
options.celebrityReply: Then stay close. I mean it.

options.label: Honest uncertainty
options.playerLine: I will try, but I am still figuring myself out too.
options.celebrityReply: At least that is real.

options.label: Choose drama
options.playerLine: I am here for plot, not peace.
options.celebrityReply: Then you are not here for me.

postTwoChats.successLine: Ariana smiles, pulls you in, and kisses you. "Do not switch up on me," she whispers.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Ariana shakes her head. "I am not doing this with you. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: Be honest, did my opening line make you blush or cringe?

options.label: Lean into it
options.playerLine: It was cheesy, but the confidence sold it.
options.celebrityReply: Cheese with confidence is a premium product.

options.label: Middle ground
options.playerLine: A little of both, if I am being real.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Mixed reviews still count as reviews.

options.label: Reject it
options.playerLine: It was painfully corny.
options.celebrityReply: Painfully? You are dramatic and I kind of hate that.

turns.celebrityLine: I like attention. Can you give that without acting possessive?

options.label: Balanced answer
options.playerLine: I can hype you up without trying to own you.
options.celebrityReply: That is grown. I respect grown.

options.label: Unclear answer
options.playerLine: Depends on how you move with me.
options.celebrityReply: So... maybe. Noted.

options.label: Controlling answer
options.playerLine: If we are locked in, your attention should be on me only.
options.celebrityReply: You sound like a contract I did not sign.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want romance or are you just collecting moments?

options.label: Pick romance
options.playerLine: Romance, but with intention and consistency.
options.celebrityReply: Consistency is sexy. Rare too.

options.label: Pick moments
options.playerLine: Moments first, commitment later.
options.celebrityReply: Not my favorite, but at least you are direct.

options.label: Pick clout
options.playerLine: Whichever one keeps me center-screen.
options.celebrityReply: Yikes. Keep that producer mindset away from me.

turns.celebrityLine: People call me corny like it is an insult. What do you think?

options.label: Defend him
options.playerLine: Corny can be charming when it is genuine.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. Let me live my soft life.

options.label: Neutral tease
options.playerLine: It is corny, but sometimes that works.
options.celebrityReply: I will take "sometimes" for now.

options.label: Clown him
options.playerLine: It sounds like you practiced in a mirror.
options.celebrityReply: You came here to roast or connect?

turns.celebrityLine: If I got insecure and overthought everything, what would you do?

options.label: Ground him
options.playerLine: I would pull you aside and calm the noise.
options.celebrityReply: That sounds dangerously comforting.

options.label: Wait it out
options.playerLine: I would give you space and let you reset.
options.celebrityReply: Space is okay, but do not vanish.

options.label: Use it against him
options.playerLine: I would keep my options open while you spiral.
options.celebrityReply: Cold. I hear you.

turns.celebrityLine: Last one: am I your pick, or just your safest option?

options.label: Choose him directly
options.playerLine: You are my pick because I like your heart and your chaos.
options.celebrityReply: Heart and chaos is my brand, honestly.

options.label: Keep it open
options.playerLine: You are high on my list, not locked yet.
options.celebrityReply: List language is brutal, but fair.

options.label: Admit strategy
options.playerLine: You are safe and predictable for this round.
options.celebrityReply: Predictable? That one stung.

postTwoChats.successLine: Drake grins and kisses you. "Do not make me write a sad song about this," he says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Drake steps back. "I am good. Leave me alone for a minute."

turns.celebrityLine: I try to keep promises, but I do not always follow through. Does that scare you?

options.label: Encourage honesty
options.playerLine: Not if you stay honest when things change.
options.celebrityReply: I can do honest. I am trying to do better.

options.label: Stay cautious
options.playerLine: It worries me, but I appreciate you saying it.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Caution is earned, not granted.

options.label: Call her flaky
options.playerLine: So your word does not really mean much?
options.celebrityReply: That is harsher than it needed to be.

turns.celebrityLine: When pressure hits, do you get calmer or louder?

options.label: Calm answer
options.playerLine: Calmer. I would rather solve than perform.
options.celebrityReply: That is exactly what I need around me.

options.label: Depends answer
options.playerLine: Depends on who I am protecting.
options.celebrityReply: Protective can be good if it is not reckless.

options.label: Loud answer
options.playerLine: Louder. If I feel disrespected, everyone hears it.
options.celebrityReply: Yeah... that sounds exhausting.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want peace with me, or do you want storyline with me?

options.label: Choose peace
options.playerLine: Peace with chemistry. Both are possible.
options.celebrityReply: That answer feels safe in a good way.

options.label: Choose excitement
options.playerLine: I want excitement, but not destruction.
options.celebrityReply: Okay, I can work with that.

options.label: Choose chaos
options.playerLine: Storyline first. Peace is optional.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not aligned at all.

turns.celebrityLine: If I tell you one thing and do another, are you out immediately?

options.label: Hold boundaries kindly
options.playerLine: I would call it out, but I would hear you first.
options.celebrityReply: That is fair and not cruel. I respect that.

options.label: Wait and see
options.playerLine: I would watch patterns before deciding.
options.celebrityReply: Patterns are real. Good answer.

options.label: Punish instantly
options.playerLine: One slip and I move on publicly.
options.celebrityReply: Public punishment says more about you than me.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you actually listen, or do you wait for your turn to talk?

options.label: Active listener
options.playerLine: I listen first. Then I speak with intention.
options.celebrityReply: That is attractive, honestly.

options.label: Playful dodge
options.playerLine: Both. I am talented like that.
options.celebrityReply: At least you are self-aware.

options.label: Self-centered
options.playerLine: I do not need context. I trust my instincts.
options.celebrityReply: That sounds like ego, not instincts.

turns.celebrityLine: Final check: if we try this, are you patient enough for a real person?

options.label: Yes, with effort
options.playerLine: Yes. I want something real, not perfect.
options.celebrityReply: That is exactly what I needed to hear.

options.label: Unsure
options.playerLine: Maybe. I am still deciding what I can hold.
options.celebrityReply: Thank you for being real instead of fake-sweet.

options.label: No patience
options.playerLine: No, I need clean and easy.
options.celebrityReply: Then I am not your person here.

postTwoChats.successLine: Selena takes your hand, then kisses you softly. "Keep showing up like this," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Selena exhales and steps away. "No. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: I act unbothered, but pressure gets in my head fast. What do you do with that?

options.label: Steady reassurance
options.playerLine: I keep you grounded, not pressured.
options.celebrityReply: Grounded sounds amazing in this place.

options.label: Neutral response
options.playerLine: I would give advice if you asked for it.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. I hate unsolicited advice anyway.

options.label: Apply pressure
options.playerLine: I push harder until you toughen up.
options.celebrityReply: Yeah, no. I do not need a coach.

turns.celebrityLine: If the villa says we are a bad match, do you fold?

options.label: Protect the connection
options.playerLine: No. I listen to you, not the crowd.
options.celebrityReply: That is rare in here. I like that.

options.label: Hear both sides
options.playerLine: I would hear the noise, then decide with you.
options.celebrityReply: Okay. That is at least reasonable.

options.label: Follow public opinion
options.playerLine: If the room says no, I am out.
options.celebrityReply: So your backbone is rented. Good to know.

turns.celebrityLine: What do you like more: my image or my actual energy?

options.label: Choose her energy
options.playerLine: Your energy. The image is extra.
options.celebrityReply: That answer calms me down instantly.

options.label: Choose both
options.playerLine: Both matter. You are a full package.
options.celebrityReply: Smooth answer. I see you.

options.label: Choose image only
options.playerLine: The image is what I came for.
options.celebrityReply: Then you came for the wrong person.

turns.celebrityLine: Sometimes I cave when people push me. Would you push or protect?

options.label: Protect
options.playerLine: Protect. I do not force people I care about.
options.celebrityReply: That makes me feel safe. I like it.

options.label: Balance
options.playerLine: I would challenge you gently when needed.
options.celebrityReply: Gently is the key word there.

options.label: Push hard
options.playerLine: I push until you break through.
options.celebrityReply: That sounds like control, not support.

turns.celebrityLine: Are you loyal when things get embarrassing?

options.label: Loyal answer
options.playerLine: Yes. I do not abandon people under pressure.
options.celebrityReply: That is exactly what I needed to hear.

options.label: Conditional answer
options.playerLine: Depends on how bad it gets.
options.celebrityReply: At least you are not pretending.

options.label: Self-protective answer
options.playerLine: I protect my own image first.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not compatible.

turns.celebrityLine: Last one. Are we building something or just curating a vibe?

options.label: Build something
options.playerLine: Build something real, even if it is messy.
options.celebrityReply: Okay. I can do real.

options.label: Keep it casual
options.playerLine: A vibe for now. We can see later.
options.celebrityReply: Not ideal, but it is honest.

options.label: Just optics
options.playerLine: A vibe. Real is too expensive.
options.celebrityReply: Then spend that somewhere else.

postTwoChats.successLine: Kylie smiles and kisses you. "Stay solid and I stay soft," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Kylie turns away. "Nope. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: Everyone in this villa performs. I perform too. Can you tell when I am real?

options.label: See through the act
options.playerLine: Yeah. Your eyes change when you stop performing.
options.celebrityReply: Okay, that was observant. I like that.

options.label: Unsure
options.playerLine: Sometimes. You are hard to read on purpose.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. I am protective with my real self.

options.label: Accuse her
options.playerLine: No. You are fake all the time.
options.celebrityReply: Then do not waste my time.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want the polished version of me, or the chaotic one?

options.label: Choose real
options.playerLine: The real one. Polished can wait.
options.celebrityReply: That is risky. I respect risky.

options.label: Choose both
options.playerLine: Give me both. I can handle range.
options.celebrityReply: Range is expensive. Hope you can afford it.

options.label: Choose polished only
options.playerLine: Polished only. Chaos is unattractive.
options.celebrityReply: Then you want a brand, not a person.

turns.celebrityLine: If we coupled up, would you back me when I get loud?

options.label: Back her smartly
options.playerLine: I back you and pull you private before it explodes.
options.celebrityReply: That is loyal and strategic. Dangerous combo.

options.label: Stay neutral
options.playerLine: I would stay out unless you asked me in.
options.celebrityReply: Neutral can feel like absence, just saying.

options.label: Embarrass her
options.playerLine: I would distance myself from your drama publicly.
options.celebrityReply: Then you are not my person.

turns.celebrityLine: Would you rather have a calm partner or a memorable one?

options.label: Memorable with depth
options.playerLine: Memorable, as long as it is real.
options.celebrityReply: You speak my language.

options.label: Calm preference
options.playerLine: Calm, but not boring.
options.celebrityReply: Reasonable. Maybe too reasonable.

options.label: Boring is best
options.playerLine: Calm and invisible. I hate attention.
options.celebrityReply: Then why are you even here?

turns.celebrityLine: What do you do when someone calls your relationship performative?

options.label: Defend together
options.playerLine: We stay aligned and let consistency shut them up.
options.celebrityReply: Consistency is louder than rumors. Nice.

options.label: Ignore it
options.playerLine: Ignore them and move on.
options.celebrityReply: Not bad. Silence can be power.

options.label: Blame her
options.playerLine: I would tell them you probably are performative.
options.celebrityReply: Wow. You are not loyal at all.

turns.celebrityLine: Final question: are you here to be chosen, or to choose me?

options.label: Choose her
options.playerLine: To choose you, clearly and loudly.
options.celebrityReply: Say less. I heard you.

options.label: Keep options open
options.playerLine: Both. I want options and connection.
options.celebrityReply: At least you are transparent.

options.label: Use her for game
options.playerLine: To survive rounds. Nothing deeper.
options.celebrityReply: Then survive without me.

postTwoChats.successLine: Erika laughs, grabs your collar, and kisses you. "Now that is chemistry," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Erika rolls her eyes. "You are done. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: You seem serious. I can be serious too... unless I decide to be unserious on purpose.

options.label: Match the wit
options.playerLine: Unserious with intention is still strategy.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. You are catching the rhythm.

options.label: Play safe
options.playerLine: I prefer clear signals over games.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Clarity has value.

options.label: Dismiss him
options.playerLine: Sounds like you dodge accountability with jokes.
options.celebrityReply: Careful. You are talking too loud for turn one.

turns.celebrityLine: What is your relationship strategy: heart, power, or optics?

options.label: Heart and discipline
options.playerLine: Heart first, discipline second. Optics last.
options.celebrityReply: That is a strong framework.

options.label: Balanced approach
options.playerLine: All three, depending on the round.
options.celebrityReply: Adaptive. Not bad.

options.label: Pure optics
options.playerLine: Optics only. Feelings are inefficient.
options.celebrityReply: Then you are running the wrong business.

turns.celebrityLine: Can you be loyal without being naive?

options.label: Mature loyalty
options.playerLine: Yes. Loyalty with awareness, not blindness.
options.celebrityReply: That is exactly the answer I wanted.

options.label: Conditional loyalty
options.playerLine: Only while it benefits both of us.
options.celebrityReply: Transactional, but honest.

options.label: No loyalty
options.playerLine: No. I pivot the moment it gets hard.
options.celebrityReply: Then you are a liability.

turns.celebrityLine: If I joke through tension, are you laughing with me or panicking?

options.label: Laugh and lead
options.playerLine: Laugh first, then lead us through it.
options.celebrityReply: Composed. I like composed.

options.label: Watch first
options.playerLine: I read the room before reacting.
options.celebrityReply: Measured. That can work.

options.label: Call him unserious
options.playerLine: I would assume you are not taking us seriously.
options.celebrityReply: You mistake style for lack of substance.

turns.celebrityLine: Could you handle being with someone bigger than the room?

options.label: Yes with confidence
options.playerLine: Yes. I do not shrink around big energy.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Shrinking is expensive.

options.label: Maybe answer
options.playerLine: Maybe. Depends how we share that spotlight.
options.celebrityReply: Fair negotiation.

options.label: Insecure answer
options.playerLine: No. I need to be the center always.
options.celebrityReply: Then we have no deal.

turns.celebrityLine: Last offer: are we building legacy or just surviving tonight?

options.label: Build legacy
options.playerLine: Legacy. Starting tonight.
options.celebrityReply: Now you are talking my language.

options.label: Survive tonight
options.playerLine: Tonight first, legacy later.
options.celebrityReply: Short-term play. Noted.

options.label: Pure survival
options.playerLine: Just surviving. No attachment.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not aligned.

postTwoChats.successLine: Jay-Z smirks, pulls you in, and kisses you. "Now that is a smart move," he says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Jay-Z steps back. "Conversation over. Leave me alone."

normalChats.title: Vision Test by the Fire Pit

turns.celebrityLine: I do not do small ideas. Can you think bigger than this villa?

options.label: Match his ambition
options.playerLine: Yes. I am here to build something unforgettable, not just survive episodes.
options.celebrityReply: Now that is language I respect.

options.label: Keep it practical
options.playerLine: I think big, but I build step by step.
options.celebrityReply: Safe, but at least it is honest.

options.label: Dismiss him
options.playerLine: Big talk is easy. Most people never deliver.
options.celebrityReply: You came in negative. That is not my vibe.

turns.celebrityLine: If people turn on me in this villa, do you stand with me or go silent?

options.label: Stand with him
options.playerLine: I stand with you publicly and correct things privately.
options.celebrityReply: Loyal and smart. That matters.

options.label: Stay neutral
options.playerLine: I would hear both sides before I move.
options.celebrityReply: Neutral can be fair. It can also be weak.

options.label: Protect yourself first
options.playerLine: I would distance myself if heat gets too high.
options.celebrityReply: Then do not ask for loyalty from me.

turns.celebrityLine: Last check: do you want peace, or do you want greatness?

options.label: Choose greatness
options.playerLine: Greatness, but with discipline and intention.
options.celebrityReply: Good answer. Chaos without discipline is useless.

options.label: Choose balance
options.playerLine: Both. Peace keeps greatness alive.
options.celebrityReply: Balanced. Not flashy, but valid.

options.label: Choose comfort
options.playerLine: I choose comfort over all of that.
options.celebrityReply: Comfort never built anything iconic.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you trust vision before results, or do you need proof first?

options.label: Trust with standards
options.playerLine: I trust vision when the work matches the words.
options.celebrityReply: That is fair. I respect standards.

options.label: Need some proof
options.playerLine: I need enough proof to believe, then I go all in.
options.celebrityReply: Reasonable, even if it is cautious.

options.label: No trust
options.playerLine: I do not trust big vision at all.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are wasting each other's time.

turns.celebrityLine: If I challenge you hard, do you crumble or respond?

options.label: Respond with calm
options.playerLine: I respond. Pressure makes me sharper.
options.celebrityReply: That is the energy I need next to me.

options.label: Take space first
options.playerLine: I reset first, then respond clearly.
options.celebrityReply: Not bad. Better than crashing out.

options.label: Crash out
options.playerLine: I go loud and make it everyone's problem.
options.celebrityReply: That is not strength. That is noise.

turns.celebrityLine: Are you choosing me, or are you choosing safety?

options.label: Choose him directly
options.playerLine: I choose you. No hedge.
options.celebrityReply: Say less. I hear conviction.

options.label: Stay open
options.playerLine: I am still deciding where I fit best.
options.celebrityReply: Honest, but not exciting.

options.label: Choose safety
options.playerLine: I choose whoever gives me the easiest round.
options.celebrityReply: Then go be easy somewhere else.

postTwoChats.successLine: Kanye pulls you in and kisses you. "Do not fold when it gets loud," he says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Kanye steps back. "No. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: Can you handle a woman with main-character energy, or do you panic?

options.label: Match her confidence
options.playerLine: I do not panic around power. I rise with it.
options.celebrityReply: Okayyy. That is cute and confident.

options.label: Play it neutral
options.playerLine: I can handle it if we communicate clearly.
options.celebrityReply: Fair answer. A little safe, but fair.

options.label: Undermine her
options.playerLine: Main-character energy is usually ego in disguise.
options.celebrityReply: You tried it. Wrong target.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you flirt with wit, or just volume?

options.label: Use wit
options.playerLine: Wit. Loud without substance is boring.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. Keep it sharp.

options.label: Use both
options.playerLine: Both, depending on the room.
options.celebrityReply: Adaptive. I can work with adaptive.

options.label: Use volume only
options.playerLine: Volume wins. Detail is overrated.
options.celebrityReply: That is amateur behavior.

turns.celebrityLine: If someone disrespects me in front of you, what happens?

options.label: Back her smartly
options.playerLine: I back you, then we close it with strategy.
options.celebrityReply: Loyal and tactical? Period.

options.label: Stay out
options.playerLine: I stay out unless you ask me in.
options.celebrityReply: Neutral is fine once. Not always.

options.label: Blame her
options.playerLine: I would tell you to calm down publicly.
options.celebrityReply: Public embarrassment is an immediate no.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want a soft love story, or one with sparks and teeth?

options.label: Choose sparks
options.playerLine: Sparks and teeth, but with respect.
options.celebrityReply: Yes. Respect keeps the fire clean.

options.label: Choose softness
options.playerLine: Softness first, intensity later.
options.celebrityReply: Not my default, but I hear it.

options.label: Choose easy game
options.playerLine: I choose whatever keeps my stress low.
options.celebrityReply: Then this is above your pay grade.

turns.celebrityLine: Can you take teasing without getting insecure?

options.label: Confident answer
options.playerLine: Yes. I can laugh and still stand tall.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Fragile energy is exhausting.

options.label: Mixed answer
options.playerLine: Usually, if it stays playful.
options.celebrityReply: Reasonable boundary.

options.label: Defensive answer
options.playerLine: No. I would clap back immediately.
options.celebrityReply: Then we would fight every hour.

turns.celebrityLine: Final question: are you bold enough to choose me out loud?

options.label: Choose loudly
options.playerLine: Yes. I choose you, clearly.
options.celebrityReply: Now that is what I wanted.

options.label: Keep it private
options.playerLine: I choose you, but I move quiet.
options.celebrityReply: Quiet can be cute... sometimes.

options.label: Keep options
options.playerLine: I am still collecting options this round.
options.celebrityReply: Then collect yourself away from me.

postTwoChats.successLine: Nicki grins, pulls you close, and kisses you. "Keep that same energy," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Nicki looks you over and shrugs. "Nope. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: Do you listen to understand, or listen to reply?

options.label: Understand first
options.playerLine: Understand first. Replies can wait.
options.celebrityReply: That is rare in this environment.

options.label: Both
options.playerLine: Both. I absorb and respond in real time.
options.celebrityReply: Balanced. Nothing wrong with balanced.

options.label: Reply first
options.playerLine: Reply first. Silence is wasted time.
options.celebrityReply: That mindset misses too much.

turns.celebrityLine: If the villa rewards fake energy, do you adapt or stay real?

options.label: Stay real
options.playerLine: Stay real. I would rather lose than perform fake.
options.celebrityReply: Integrity matters. I respect that.

options.label: Strategic blend
options.playerLine: I stay real, but I package it smartly.
options.celebrityReply: That is thoughtful. I can respect thoughtful.

options.label: Perform fake
options.playerLine: I perform whatever wins the room.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are built different.

turns.celebrityLine: What do you value more here: attention or alignment?

options.label: Alignment
options.playerLine: Alignment. Attention fades fast.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. You are speaking with intention.

options.label: Both equally
options.playerLine: Both matter if you use them right.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Depends how clean your motives are.

options.label: Attention only
options.playerLine: Attention. That is the game.
options.celebrityReply: Not my game.

turns.celebrityLine: Can you take accountability without collapsing into ego?

options.label: Own it calmly
options.playerLine: Yes. I own mistakes and adjust quickly.
options.celebrityReply: That is growth, not performance.

options.label: Depends answer
options.playerLine: Depends how I am approached.
options.celebrityReply: Context matters. True.

options.label: Deflect always
options.playerLine: No. I defend myself no matter what.
options.celebrityReply: Deflection is loud weakness.

turns.celebrityLine: If I need space to think, do you respect it?

options.label: Respect space
options.playerLine: Yes. Space can be care when done right.
options.celebrityReply: That answer is mature.

options.label: Give short leash
options.playerLine: I give space, but not silence forever.
options.celebrityReply: Reasonable boundary.

options.label: Pressure immediately
options.playerLine: No. We resolve it now or never.
options.celebrityReply: That is force, not connection.

turns.celebrityLine: Are you picking me for substance, or for safety?

options.label: Choose substance
options.playerLine: Substance. I like depth over noise.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Depth is expensive. Worth it though.

options.label: Mixed motives
options.playerLine: Both, if I am honest.
options.celebrityReply: Honesty counts.

options.label: Choose safety only
options.playerLine: Safety. I just need easy rounds.
options.celebrityReply: Then I am not your lane.

postTwoChats.successLine: Kendrick smiles, leans in, and kisses you. "Keep it real with me," he says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Kendrick steps back. "Nah. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: I am fun, weird, and impulsive. Is that exciting or exhausting to you?

options.label: Exciting answer
options.playerLine: Exciting. I can handle spontaneity.
options.celebrityReply: Yesss. Finally someone who gets it.

options.label: Measured answer
options.playerLine: Exciting in moderation.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Moderation is not my favorite word though.

options.label: Exhausted answer
options.playerLine: Exhausting. I need predictable energy.
options.celebrityReply: Then I am probably not your vibe.

turns.celebrityLine: If I say something dumb under pressure, do you roast me or help me reset?

options.label: Help him reset
options.playerLine: Reset first, jokes later.
options.celebrityReply: That is actually really kind.

options.label: Light roast
options.playerLine: One joke, then reset.
options.celebrityReply: I can live with that.

options.label: Public roast
options.playerLine: I roast you in front of everybody.
options.celebrityReply: Yeah, hard pass.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want playful love or serious love?

options.label: Playful and loyal
options.playerLine: Playful and loyal. Both.
options.celebrityReply: That is the best combo.

options.label: Still deciding
options.playerLine: I am still figuring that out.
options.celebrityReply: Real answer. Respect.

options.label: No love, just game
options.playerLine: Neither. I am just here to win rounds.
options.celebrityReply: Then do not use me for that.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you judge people for being messy, or do you let them grow?

options.label: Let them grow
options.playerLine: Grow. Messy is part of being human.
options.celebrityReply: That is a very green-flag answer.

options.label: Case by case
options.playerLine: Depends on the pattern, not one moment.
options.celebrityReply: That is fair and thoughtful.

options.label: Judge hard
options.playerLine: I judge fast and move on.
options.celebrityReply: Cold. Not for me.

turns.celebrityLine: If someone tries to steal me, do you fight, fold, or trust me?

options.label: Trust plus effort
options.playerLine: Trust you and still show up for you.
options.celebrityReply: Perfect answer honestly.

options.label: Trust only
options.playerLine: I trust you and stay chill.
options.celebrityReply: Chill can be good.

options.label: Fold fast
options.playerLine: I fold and move to someone else.
options.celebrityReply: That is weak commitment.

turns.celebrityLine: Final one: are you into me or into the idea of me?

options.label: Into him
options.playerLine: Into you. Not the headlines.
options.celebrityReply: Good. I needed that.

options.label: Unsure answer
options.playerLine: Still learning the difference.
options.celebrityReply: Fair enough.

options.label: Into headlines
options.playerLine: The headlines help, not gonna lie.
options.celebrityReply: Yeah, no thanks.

postTwoChats.successLine: Justin laughs, pulls you in, and kisses you. "Never say never," he says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Justin shakes his head. "Not feeling this. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: Can you handle someone independent, or do you need constant reassurance?

options.label: Respect independence
options.playerLine: I respect independence. Closeness does not mean control.
options.celebrityReply: Good answer. Possessive energy is boring.

options.label: Need some reassurance
options.playerLine: I can handle independence, but I still need clarity.
options.celebrityReply: Clarity is fair. Neediness is not.

options.label: Need constant attention
options.playerLine: I need constant reassurance to feel secure.
options.celebrityReply: That is too much for me.

turns.celebrityLine: If the villa starts rumors, do you react or stay unbothered?

options.label: Stay unbothered
options.playerLine: Unbothered outside, strategic inside.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. Let them talk.

options.label: Address once
options.playerLine: Address it once, then move on.
options.celebrityReply: Reasonable.

options.label: Crash out
options.playerLine: I crash out and expose everybody.
options.celebrityReply: Messy is not cute.

turns.celebrityLine: Are you confident enough to stand next to me without shrinking?

options.label: Confident yes
options.playerLine: Yes. I do not shrink around strong people.
options.celebrityReply: Good. I can work with that.

options.label: Working on it
options.playerLine: I am still building that confidence.
options.celebrityReply: At least you know yourself.

options.label: Insecure answer
options.playerLine: No, I would probably get jealous fast.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not a fit.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you flirt with everyone, or do you move with intention?

options.label: Move with intention
options.playerLine: Intention. I do not waste signals.
options.celebrityReply: That is attractive.

options.label: Playful with boundaries
options.playerLine: Playful, but with clear boundaries.
options.celebrityReply: Boundaries are important.

options.label: Flirt everywhere
options.playerLine: I flirt everywhere and sort it later.
options.celebrityReply: That is chaos. Not for me.

turns.celebrityLine: Can you be soft without becoming weak?

options.label: Soft and strong
options.playerLine: Yes. Softness can be strength.
options.celebrityReply: Exactly. You understand nuance.

options.label: Sometimes
options.playerLine: Sometimes. I am still learning that.
options.celebrityReply: Learning is valid.

options.label: No softness
options.playerLine: No. Softness gets people hurt.
options.celebrityReply: That is fear talking.

turns.celebrityLine: Final question: are you choosing me, or trying to survive my aura?

options.label: Choose her
options.playerLine: Choosing you. Fully.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Keep that energy.

options.label: Unsure choice
options.playerLine: I am still deciding what I can hold.
options.celebrityReply: Honesty is better than fake certainty.

options.label: Survival mode
options.playerLine: Surviving. You are intense.
options.celebrityReply: Then survive elsewhere.

postTwoChats.successLine: Rihanna smirks, pulls you close, and kisses you. "Do not waste this," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Rihanna raises a brow. "No. Leave me alone."

turns.celebrityLine: I value discipline. Do you show up consistently, or only when it is easy?

options.label: Consistent answer
options.playerLine: Consistently. Especially when it is hard.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Consistency is rare and valuable.

options.label: Honest middle
options.playerLine: I try, but I am still building that muscle.
options.celebrityReply: Growth is acceptable when it is real.

options.label: Easy-mode answer
options.playerLine: Only when it is easy. Life is short.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not aligned.

turns.celebrityLine: If we couple up, can you handle high standards without resentment?

options.label: Embrace standards
options.playerLine: Yes. Standards sharpen people.
options.celebrityReply: Strong answer.

options.label: Negotiate standards
options.playerLine: Yes, if we hold each other equally accountable.
options.celebrityReply: Fair. Accountability should be mutual.

options.label: Reject standards
options.playerLine: No. Standards kill spontaneity.
options.celebrityReply: Not true. They protect what matters.

turns.celebrityLine: Do you want partnership, or just proximity to status?

options.label: Choose partnership
options.playerLine: Partnership. Status is a side effect.
options.celebrityReply: That is the right priority.

options.label: Mixed motives
options.playerLine: Both, if I am honest.
options.celebrityReply: Honesty helps. Now prove depth.

options.label: Choose status
options.playerLine: Status first. Partnership later.
options.celebrityReply: Then this conversation is over soon.

turns.celebrityLine: When conflict hits, do you get precise or performative?

options.label: Get precise
options.playerLine: Precise. I solve, I do not perform.
options.celebrityReply: Excellent. Precision is power.

options.label: Blend both
options.playerLine: A little of both depending on stakes.
options.celebrityReply: Context matters.

options.label: Get performative
options.playerLine: Performative. I like spectacle.
options.celebrityReply: Spectacle is not substance.

turns.celebrityLine: Can you celebrate me without making it about yourself?

options.label: Celebrate her fully
options.playerLine: Yes. I can celebrate you with no insecurity.
options.celebrityReply: That is secure energy.

options.label: Sometimes insecure
options.playerLine: I can, but I would need to manage my ego.
options.celebrityReply: Self-awareness is a start.

options.label: Make it about yourself
options.playerLine: No. I need equal spotlight at all times.
options.celebrityReply: Then we are not a match.

turns.celebrityLine: Final question: are you ready for excellence, or just flirting with it?

options.label: Ready for excellence
options.playerLine: Ready. Fully.
options.celebrityReply: Good. Then act like it.

options.label: Learning path
options.playerLine: Learning, but committed to growth.
options.celebrityReply: Commitment matters.

options.label: Not ready
options.playerLine: Not ready. I just want easy chemistry.
options.celebrityReply: Easy is not what I do.

postTwoChats.successLine: Beyonce smiles and kisses you with calm confidence. "Maintain this standard," she says.
postTwoChats.failureLine: Beyonce steps back. "No. Leave me alone."
